ddls:
CREATE TABLE "modeling_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each modeling method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the modeling method (e.g., System Dynamics) */,
  "gis_integration" INTEGER /* Indicates if GIS integration is available */,
  "abstraction_levels" INTEGER /* Indicates if the method supports high, middle, and low abstraction levels */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the method is actively used */,
  "behavior_rules" INTEGER /* Indicates if individual behavior rules can be defined */,
  "documentation" INTEGER /* Indicates if the method is well-documented and open source */,
  "license" TEXT /* License associated with the modeling method */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the modeling method */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Description of the method's parameters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, policymaker, educator) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization affiliation */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department affiliation */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position within the organization */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the modeling method used */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user leading the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the project */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., ongoing, completed, pending) */,
  "sponsor" TEXT /* Sponsor of the project */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated to the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES modeling_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulations" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation run */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project associated with the simulation */,
  "run_date" TEXT /* Date when the simulation was run */,
  "results_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the results of the simulation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the simulation (e.g., completed, in progress) */,
  "simulation_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the simulation */,
  "input_parameters" TEXT /* Input parameters used for the simulation */,
  "output_variables" TEXT /* Output variables generated by the simulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborators" (
  "collaborator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaborator */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user collaborating */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the collaborator (e.g., researcher, policymaker) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of collaboration */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of collaboration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaborator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborators_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborators_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_outputs" (
  "output_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each output variable */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the simulation */,
  "variable_name" TEXT /* Name of the output variable */,
  "variable_value" TEXT /* Value of the output variable */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the output variable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("output_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_outputs_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the modeling method */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_parameters_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES modeling_methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gis_data" (
  "gis_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GIS data */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of GIS data (e.g., shapefile, raster) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the GIS data */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the GIS data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gis_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gis_data_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
